roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PC 4011,6 REPORT FOR MBHC PURPOSES AND RECEIPT OF ICR ACM REPORT ANDPRE-TRIAL CONFERENCE/X: PC 4011,6 AND ACM REPORT RECEIVED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BYTHE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BYTHE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THENEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRE-TRIAL CONFERENCE/DOPU: FULLY COMPLIANT ACM REPORT/VD: COURT DATE ON 11-01-19/
